blocks.content: Rian spat out the water he was drinking.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It was neither the time nor place, but to hear that Shirone was in danger was shocking.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: He had been planning to see his friend off in a few hours, making it even more perplexing.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone? What happened?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well... um...

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Speak quickly! What happened?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It seems Head Butler Louis reported to the lord. I don't know much, but from what I heard, the young master and a boy named Shirone were like friends...

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Damn it all!
Rian immediately picked up his clothes that were drying on a rock.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: What's going on? And who is Shirone?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: A friend, sir. I didn't mention him because he's a commoner, but it seems Louis has snitched. That despicable man! Master, let's end today's training. I need to go to the mansion.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: No. That's not possible.
Rian, who was about to dash off to the training ground, turned back to Kaite with an astonished face.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What do you mean? My friend is in danger.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: You said he's a commoner.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What does that matter? Master, were you always like this? You said it yourself! Anyone who can converse through swords can be a friend!
Kaite clicked his tongue.
His thoughtless disciple had finally caused trouble.
Though he didn't know the exact circumstances, having lived a long life, he could roughly outline what had happened.

blocks.speaker: Kaite
blocks.content: What are you going to do when you get back? Are you going to whine? Or do you plan to act cute to change your father's mind?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Master!
Rian, anyone can be a friend. But that's between you and that boy. Your friend has directly challenged the hierarchy of the Ozent family. This isn't something that childish whining can fix.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: So you're saying I should just sit here? I was the one who reached out to Shirone first. I don't want to be a coward!
Kaite stared into his disciple's eyes.
What fine eyes they were. Truthful, passionate, and above all, pure.
